summary: Code review verified both fixes: (1) Preview Refresh button fix - handleRefresh now uses forceRefreshRef and calls onRefreshFiles instead of directly calling setRefreshKey, preventing double iframe rebuild. (2) Visual Asset Rules - both refinement and build prompts now include concrete visual asset rules that forbid abstract CSS circles/blobs. UI testing blocked by login flow issue (Supabase auth not completing in browser automation).

ui_bugs.issue: Login flow not completing in browser automation - Supabase signInWithPassword succeeds via API but UI doesn't redirect to dashboard
ui_bugs.note: Supabase API auth works directly (curl test passed), but browser-based login doesn't complete. May be cookie/session handling issue in test environment.

handleRefresh_implementation.description: handleRefresh uses forceRefreshRef.current = true and calls onRefreshFiles() instead of directly calling setRefreshKey

useEffect_files_handler.description: useEffect checks forceRefreshRef.current flag and handles single refreshKey increment, then resets flag to false

handleRefreshFiles_callback.description: handleRefreshFiles fetches files from /api/projects/{id}/files and calls setFiles

refinement_prompt_rules.description: VISUAL ASSET RULES — CRITICAL section includes: priority order (SVG > emoji > placeholders > CSS-composed), explicit FORBIDDEN list (single-color circles, gradient blobs, empty placeholder divs), and when abstract decoration IS acceptable

build_prompt_rules.description: VISUAL ASSET RULES section includes: concrete representation requirements, priority order, and explicit prohibition of single-color circles/gradient blobs

login_flow.reason: Supabase auth not completing in browser automation environment
login_flow.api_test: PASS - Supabase API auth works directly via curl

action_items: Investigate why Supabase browser auth doesn't complete in test environment (may be cookie/session handling issue)
Consider adding a test bypass or mock auth for automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: Fix A (Preview Refresh) correctly implemented: handleRefresh sets forceRefreshRef=true and calls onRefreshFiles(), useEffect on files handles single refreshKey increment
Fix B (Visual Asset Rules) correctly implemented: Both refinement and build prompts include concrete visual asset rules with priority order and explicit forbidden list
Code quality is good - proper use of useRef for mutable flag, useCallback for stable function reference
The visual asset rules are comprehensive and should prevent AI from generating abstract CSS shapes for concrete object requests

success_rate.backend: N/A (no backend API changes to test)
success_rate.frontend: Code review: 100% (all changes verified), UI tests: 0% (blocked by login)

test_credentials: REDACTED_LEAKED_USER / REDACTED_LEAKED_PASSWORD (verified working via Supabase API)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both code fixes verified via code review. Login flow blocked in browser automation - Supabase API auth works but browser session doesn't complete. Previous iteration (47) confirmed login worked, so this may be a transient environment issue. Key code locations: PreviewTab.jsx lines 567-582 (useEffect), 747-759 (handleRefresh); RightPanel.jsx lines 38-47 (handleRefreshFiles); service.js lines 561-584 (refinement rules), 635-640 (build rules).
